quotes.text: The only way to make sense out of change is to plunge into it, move with it, and join the dance.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: This is the real secret of life — to be completely engaged with what you are doing in the here and now. And instead of calling it work, realize it is play.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Muddy water is best cleared by leaving it alone.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: You are a function of what the whole universe is doing in the same way that a wave is a function of what the whole ocean is doing.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: The meaning of life is just to be alive. It is so plain and so obvious and so simple. And yet, everybody rushes around in a great panic as if it were necessary to achieve something beyond themselves.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: No valid plans for the future can be made by those who have no capacity for living now.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Trying to define yourself is like trying to bite your own teeth.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Man suffers only because he takes seriously what the gods made for fun.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: You don't look out there for God, something in the sky, you look in you.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: The art of living is neither careless drifting on the one hand nor fearful clinging on the other.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Every intelligent individual wants to know what makes him tick, and yet is at once fascinated and frustrated by the fact that oneself is the most difficult of all things to know.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: We seldom realize that our most private thoughts and emotions are not actually our own. For we think in terms of languages and images which we did not invent.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Problems that remain persistently insoluble should always be suspected as questions asked in the wrong way.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: To have faith is to trust yourself to the water. When you swim you don't grab hold of the water, because if you do you will sink and drown. Instead you relax, and float.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: The only way to live is by accepting each minute as an unrepeatable miracle.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: You are under no obligation to be the same person you were five minutes ago.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: A scholar tries to learn something every day; a student of Buddhism tries to unlearn something daily.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Waking up to who you are requires letting go of who you imagine yourself to be.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Life is like music for its own sake. We are living in an eternal now, and when we listen to music we are not listening to the past, we are not listening to the future, we are listening to an expanded present.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Things are as they are. Looking out into the universe at night, we make no comparisons between right and wrong stars, nor between well and badly arranged constellations.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: You are that vast thing that you see far, far off with great telescopes.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: We do not come into this world; we come out of it, as leaves from a tree.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: What I am really saying is that you don't need to do anything, because if you see yourself in the correct way, you are all as much extraordinary phenomenon of nature as trees, clouds, the patterns in running water.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: The more a thing tends to be permanent, the more it tends to be lifeless.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Zen does not confuse spirituality with thinking about God while one is peeling potatoes. Zen spirituality is just to peel the potatoes.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Reality is only a Rorschach ink-blot, you know.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: One is a great deal less anxious if one feels perfectly free to be anxious.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Through our eyes, the universe is perceiving itself. Through our ears, the universe is listening to its harmonies.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: Just as true humor is laughter at oneself, true humanity is knowledge of oneself.
quotes.author: Alan Watts

quotes.text: There will always be suffering. But we must not suffer over the suffering.
quotes.author: Alan Watts
